libraryDescription:
The tool.Graph2D API library, hereafter the Graph2D library, is a library for controlling 2D graph software.

The Graph2D library is an extension library and is not included in the standard libraries defined by the VCSSL language specification. Therefore, support for the Graph2D library implementation is not guaranteed in every VCSSL implementation.

The specification of the Graph2D library is defined assuming control of widely used general-purpose 2D graph software from VCSSL, and it is not intended for a specific 2D graph application. In an implementation of the Graph2D library, what kind of 2D graph software is adopted as the control target depends on the implementation, the vendor of the implementation, its version, or plugins that provide communication functions with graph software. Because of these circumstances, the functions provided by the Graph2D library should not be expected to behave in exactly the same way across different implementations.

Even in the same implementation, because the Graph2D library is not a standard library, its implementation is not guaranteed to behave permanently in the same way. Keep in mind that the implementation of the Graph2D library is only an extension feature supported independently by the implementation. For example, if the graph software receives a major update, the behavior of the Graph2D library may also change slightly as a result.

In the RINEARN VCSSL Runtime and VCSSL-supported software equipped with it, such as Rinearn Processor,the Graph2D library is supported, and its implementation adopts the graph software RINRARN Graph 2D for scientific and technical fields.Since the RINRARN Graph 2D program itself, RinearnGraph2D.jar, is bundled in the distribution package of the VCSSL Runtime,nothing needs to be prepared separately.

function0.name: newGraph2D
function0.description: Creates a 2D graph with the default size, assigns its unique identifier, the graph ID, and returns it.
function0.returnValue: (int type) The ID of the created graph.

function1.name: newGraph2D
function1.declaration: int newGraph2D( int x, int y, int width, int height, string title )
function1.description: Creates a 2D graph with the specified size, assigns its unique identifier, the graph ID, and returns it.
function1.parameters:
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the top-left corner of the graph window. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the graph window. 
(int type) width : The width of the graph window. 
(int type) height : The height of the graph window. 
(string type) title : The title of the graph window.
function1.returnValue: (int type) The ID of the created graph.

function2.name: getGraph2D
function2.description: If there is a special graph started and allocated by the implementation, gets its graph ID. Otherwise, creates a new one.
function2.returnValue: (int type) The obtained or created graph ID.

function3.name: deleteGraph2D
function3.parameters: (int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph.

function4.name: clearGraph2D
function4.description: Clears the contents of the graph.
function4.parameters: (int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph.

function5.name: getGraph2DGraphics
function5.description: Converts the drawing contents held by the graph into graphics resource compatible with the Graphics library.The converted graphics resource can be processed with a 2D or 3D renderer and so on.
function5.parameters: (int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph.

function6.name: setGraph2DLocation
function6.declaration: void setGraph2DLocation( int graphID, int x, int y )
function6.description: Sets the location of the graph window.
function6.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the top-left corner of the graph window. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the graph window.

function7.name: setGraph2DSize
function7.declaration: void setGraph2DSize( int graphID, int width, int height )
function7.description: Sets the size of the graph window.
function7.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(int type) width : The width of the graph window. 
(int type) height : The height of the graph window.

function8.name: hideGraph2D
function8.parameters: (int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph.

function9.name: showGraph2D
function9.parameters: (int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph.

function10.name: setGraph2DFile
function10.declaration: void setGraph2DFile( int graphID, string filePath )
function10.description: Loads a file and plots it on the graph.
function10.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) filePath : The file name or path of the file to plot.

function11.name: setGraph2DFile
function11.declaration: void setGraph2DFile( int graphID, string file[ ] )
function11.description: Loads multiple files and plots them on the graph.
function11.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string[] type) file : The file name or path of the file to plot.

function12.name: setGraph2DData
function12.declaration: void setGraph2DData( int graphID, string data )
function12.description: Loads text written in the same format as the contents of a file and plots it on the graph.
function12.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) data : The text written in the same format as the contents of a file.

function13.name: setGraph2DData
function13.declaration: void setGraph2DData( int graphID, float dataX[ ], float dataY[ ] )
function13.description: Loads float arrays storing coordinate values and plots them on the graph.
function13.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(float[] type) dataX : The array storing the X coordinates, indexed by point index. 
(float[] type) dataY : The array storing the Y coordinates, indexed by point index.

function14.name: setGraph2DData
function14.declaration: void setGraph2DData( int graphID, float dataX[ ][ ], float dataY[ ][ ] )
function14.description: Loads float arrays storing coordinate values and plots them on the graph.
function14.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(float[][] type) dataX : The array storing the X coordinates, indexed by series index and point index. 
(float[][] type) dataY : The array storing the Y coordinates, indexed by series index and point index.

function15.name: addGraph2DData
function15.declaration: void addGraph2DData( int graphID, float dataX[ ], float dataY[ ] )
function15.description: Loads float arrays storing coordinate values and adds them to the graph as an additional plot.
function15.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(float[] type) dataX : The array storing the X coordinates, indexed by point index. 
(float[] type) dataY : The array storing the Y coordinates, indexed by point index.

function16.name: addGraph2DData
function16.declaration: void addGraph2DData( int graphID, float dataX[ ][ ], float dataY[ ][ ] )
function16.description: Loads float arrays storing coordinate values and adds them to the graph as an additional plot.
function16.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(float[][] type) dataX : The array storing the X coordinates, indexed by series index and point index. 
(float[][] type) dataY : The array storing the Y coordinates, indexed by series index and point index.

function17.name: setGraph2DConfigurationFile
function17.declaration: void setGraph2DConfigurationFile( int graphID, string file )
function17.description: Loads a configuration file and applies settings to the graph automatically.
function17.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) file : The file name or path of the configuration file.

function18.name: setGraph2DConfigurationCode
function18.declaration: void setGraph2DConfigurationCode( int graphID, string code )
function18.description: Loads code written in the same format as a configuration file, configuration code, and applies settings to the graph automatically.
function18.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
line : The contents of the configuration code.

function19.name: setGraph2DRange
function19.declaration: void setGraph2DRange( int graphID, double xMin, double xMax, double yMin, double yMax )
function19.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(double type) xMin : The minimum value of the X axis. 
(double type) xMax : The maximum value of the X axis. 
(double type) yMin : The minimum value of the Y axis. 
(double type) yMax : The maximum value of the Y axis.

function20.name: setGraph2DRangeX
function20.declaration: void setGraph2DRangeX( int graphID, double xMin, double xMax )
function20.description: Sets the plot range of the X axis.
function20.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(double type) xMin : The minimum value of the X axis. 
(double type) xMax : The maximum value of the X axis.

function21.name: setGraph2DRangeY
function21.declaration: void setGraph2DRangeY( int graphID, double yMin, double yMax )
function21.description: Sets the plot range of the Y axis.
function21.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(double type) yMin : The minimum value of the Y axis. 
(double type) yMax : The maximum value of the Y axis.

function22.name: setGraph2DAutoRange
function22.declaration: void setGraph2DAutoRange( int graphID, bool autoX, bool autoY )
function22.description: Enables or disables the automatic adjustment feature for the plot range.
function22.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(bool type) autoX : True to enable automatic adjustment in the X-axis direction, or false to disable it. 
(bool type) autoY : True to enable automatic adjustment in the Y-axis direction, or false to disable it.

function23.name: setGraph2DLabel
function23.declaration: void setGraph2DLabel( int graphID, string xLabel, string yLabel )
function23.description: Sets the labels of each axis.
function23.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) xLabel : The label of the X axis. 
(string type) yLabel : The label of the Y axis.

function24.name: setGraph2DLabelX
function24.declaration: void setGraph2DLabelX( int graphID, string label )
function24.description: Sets the label of the X axis.
function24.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) label : The label of the X axis.

function25.name: setGraph2DLabelY
function25.declaration: void setGraph2DLabelY( int graphID, string label )
function25.description: Sets the label of the Y axis.
function25.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) label : The label of the Y axis.

function26.name: setGraph2DTick
function26.declaration: void setGraph2DTick( int graphID, double xTickCoords[ ], string xTickLabels[ ], double yTickCoords[ ], string yTickLabels[ ] )
function26.description: Sets the tick marks of each axis.
function26.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(double[] type) xTickCoords : The coordinate values of the tick positions on the X axis. 
(string[] type) xTickLabels : The labels of the tick marks on the X axis. 
(double[] type) yTickCoords : The coordinate values of the tick positions on the Y axis. 
(string[] type) yTickLabels : The labels of the tick marks on the Y axis.

function27.name: setGraph2DTickX
function27.declaration: void setGraph2DTickX( int graphID, double tickCoords[ ], string tickLabels[ ] )
function27.description: Sets the tick marks of the X axis.
function27.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(double[] type) tickCoords : The coordinate values of the tick positions. 
(string[] type) tickLabels : The labels of the tick marks.

function28.name: setGraph2DTickY
function28.declaration: void setGraph2DTickY( int graphID, double tickCoords[ ], string tickLabels[ ] )
function28.description: Sets the tick marks of the Y axis.
function28.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(double[] type) tickCoords : The coordinate values of the tick positions. 
(string[] type) tickLabels : The labels of the tick marks.

function29.name: setGraph2DOption
function29.declaration: void setGraph2DOption( int graphID, string option, bool value )
function29.description: Sets an option item of the graph. The item names depend on the implementation. Representative option item names are as follows:<dl><dt>WITH_POINTS</dt><dd>Point plot</dd><dt>WITH_LINES</dt><dd>Line plot</dd><dt>WITH_DOTS</dt><dd>Dot plot</dd><dt>WITH_GRID_LINE</dt><dd>Grid-line drawing</dd><dt>LOG_X</dt><dd>Display the X axis in logarithmic scale</dd><dt>LOG_Y</dt><dd>Display the Y axis in logarithmic scale</dd><dt>REVERSE_X</dt><dd>Reverse the X axis</dd><dt>REVERSE_Y</dt><dd>Reverse the Y axis</dd></dl>
function29.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) option : The name of the option item. 
(bool type) value : True to enable the option, or false to disable it.

function30.name: setGraph2DMenu
function30.declaration: void setGraph2DMenu( int graphID, string menu, string value )
function30.description:
This function is effectively used only for label settings, and it can now be replaced by functions such as setGraph2DLabel and setGraph2DLabelX or Y.Because that is more readable, it is recommended to use that form from now on unless there is a specific reason not to.

Sets a menu item of the graph. The item name depends on the implementation.
function30.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
option : The name of the menu item. 
(string type) value : True to enable the menu item, or false to disable it.

function31.name: setGraph2DAnimation
function31.declaration: void setGraph2DAnimation( int graphID, string mode, bool state )
function31.description: Enables or disables graph animation. The available animation modes depend on the implementation. Representative animation modes are as follows:<dl><dt>TRACE</dt><dd>Animate points while leaving trajectories</dd><dt>INDEX</dt><dd>Animate points</dd><dt>INDEX-SERIES</dt><dd>Animate series</dd></dl>
function31.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) mode : The animation mode. 
(bool type) state : True to enable animation, or false to disable it.

function32.name: setGraph2DTitle
function32.declaration: void setGraph2DTitle( int graphID, string title )
function32.description: Sets the title of the graph.
function32.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) title : The title.

function33.name: setGraph2DLabel
function33.declaration: void setGraph2DLabel( int graphID, string xLabel, string yLabel )
function33.description: Sets the axis labels of the graph.
function33.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) xLabel : The label of the X axis. 
(string type) yLabel : The label of the Y axis.

function34.name: setGraph2DLegend
function34.declaration: void setGraph2DLegend( int graphID, string legend[ ] )
function34.description: Sets the legend of the graph.
function34.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string[] type) legend : The array storing the legends, indexed by series index.

function35.name: exportGraph2D
function35.declaration: void exportGraph2D( int graphID, string filename, string format )
function35.description: Outputs the graph as an image.
function35.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) filename : The output file name or path. 
(string type) format : The format, either "PNG" or "JPEG".

function36.name: exportGraph2D
function36.declaration: void exportGraph2D( int graphID, string filename, string format, float quality )
function36.description: Outputs the graph as an image.
function36.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) filename : The output file name or path. 
(string type) format : The format, either "PNG" or "JPEG". 
(float type) quality : The quality, from 0.0 to 100.0.

Representative animation modes are as follows:<dl><dt>TRACE</dt><dd>Animate points while leaving trajectories</dd><dt>INDEX</dt><dd>Animate points</dd><dt>INDEX-SERIES</dt><dd>Animate series</dd></dl>
function31.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) mode : The animation mode. 
(bool type) state : True to enable animation, or false to disable it.

function32.name: setGraph2DTitle
function32.declaration: void setGraph2DTitle( int graphID, string title )
function32.description: Sets the title of the graph.
function32.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) title : The title.

function33.name: setGraph2DLabel
function33.declaration: void setGraph2DLabel( int graphID, string xLabel, string yLabel )
function33.description: Sets the axis labels of the graph.
function33.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) xLabel : The label of the X axis. 
(string type) yLabel : The label of the Y axis.

function34.name: setGraph2DLegend
function34.declaration: void setGraph2DLegend( int graphID, string legend[ ] )
function34.description: Sets the legend of the graph.
function34.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string[] type) legend : The array storing the legends, indexed by series index.

function35.name: exportGraph2D
function35.declaration: void exportGraph2D( int graphID, string filename, string format )
function35.description: Outputs the graph as an image.
function35.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) filename : The output file name or path. 
(string type) format : The format, either "PNG" or "JPEG".

function36.name: exportGraph2D
function36.declaration: void exportGraph2D( int graphID, string filename, string format, float quality )
function36.description: Outputs the graph as an image.
function36.parameters:
(int type) graphID : The ID of the target graph. 
(string type) filename : The output file name or path. 
(string type) format : The format, either "PNG" or "JPEG". 
(float type) quality : The quality, from 0.0 to 100.0.
